tools.name: get_market_snapshot
tools.description: Get the overall crypto market daily snapshot (daily narrative insight report) for a given date. Returns daily headline, delta narrative, regime + justification, α-sentiment OHLC scores (0-10 scale), α-sentiment z-scores (-3 to +3), narrative summary, narrative intesity score, market psychology, cons

tools.name: get_market_themes
tools.description: Get narrative themes dominating the crypto podcast space on a given date. Each theme includes title, summary, podcast coverage count, fragility score, novelty score and counterfactual narrative.

tools.name: get_market_signals
tools.description: Get scenario strategic signals across all assets for a given date. Each signal includes signal type, horizon, scenario description, trigger conditions, confidence score and invalidating conditions. (Not financial advice.)

tools.name: get_market_featured_quotes
tools.description: Get the top featured quotes from crypto podcasts for a given date, ranked by relevance score.

tools.name: get_market_episodes
tools.description: Get all crypto podcast episodes published on a given date, including podcast name, α-sentiment score (0-10 scale), and transcript summary.

tools.name: get_market_history
tools.description: Fetch a historical time series of daily market-level snapshots (overall market sentiment, not a single ticker). Call this when the user asks how the overall market mood/regime has trended over time, wants to chart market α-sentiment / z-score over a window, or needs a range of daily market snapshots

tools.name: get_ticker_snapshot
tools.description: Get detailed daily insights snapshot for a specific crypto asset. Returns daily asset summary, α-index (0-1), α-pulse (0-1), episode count, attention share (0-1), α-sentiment OHLC and 1-7 day delta (0-10 scale), bull/bear/neutral ratios (0-1), consensus score (0-1), novelty score (0-1), momentum, na

tools.name: get_ticker_signals
tools.description: Get scenario signals for a specific crypto asset. Returns signal type, time horizon, scenario description, trigger conditions, confidence score and invalidating conditions. (Not financial advice.)

tools.name: get_ticker_featured_quotes
tools.description: Get featured podcast quotes for a specific crypto asset on a given date, with α-sentiment scores (0-10 scale), ranked by selection score.

tools.name: get_ticker_history
tools.description: Fetch a historical time series of daily snapshots for one crypto ticker. Call this when the user asks about a ticker's recent trend, wants to chart or plot α-sentiment / α-index / α-pulse over time, asks "how has X changed over the last N days", or needs a window of data to compute averages, momentu

tools.name: get_ticker_leaderboard
tools.description: Get ticker leaderboard for a given date. Without category param, returns highlights object that includes assetSnapshot of top_alpha_index, top_alpha_pulse, top_riser, top_dropper, most_mentioned, most_surprising. With category param (alpha_index/alpha_pulse/risers/droppers/mentioned/surprising), ret

tools.name: search_podcasts
tools.description: Search for crypto podcasts by name. Returns podcast ID, name, artist, language, x-handle, and artwork.

tools.name: get_podcast_episodes
tools.description: Get recent episodes for a specific podcast by podcast ID.

tools.name: get_podcast_latest
tools.description: Get the latest episode for a specific podcast, including title, episode_id, transcript summary, episode artwork, α-sentiment (crypto markets), and traditional markets sentiment.

tools.name: get_podcast_latest_full
tools.description: Get the latest episode for a podcast with full details including quotes and asset mentions.

tools.name: get_episode_details
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific episode including title, publish date, duration, α-sentiment score (crypto) (0-10 scale), traditional markets sentiment (0-10), and podcast info.

tools.name: get_episode_summary
tools.description: Get the transcript summary for a specific episode, including assets mentioned and their α-sentiment (0-10 scale).

tools.name: get_episode_quotes
tools.description: Get all quotes extracted from a specific episode, with speaker, α-sentiment score (0-10 scale) and associated ticker.

tools.name: get_episode_transcript
tools.description: Get the full transcript for a specific episode including speaker diarization and speaker name mapping. Pro and Enterprise plans only.

tools.name: get_episode_full
tools.description: Get full episode data in one call — details, summary, quotes and asset mentions.

tools.name: get_my_favorite_assets
tools.description: Get the list of crypto assets the authenticated user has favorited on AudioAlpha. Always returns the latest authoritative snapshot (is_latest) per asset.

tools.name: get_my_favorite_podcasts
tools.description: Get the list of podcasts the authenticated user follows on AudioAlpha.

tools.name: get_my_feed
tools.description: Get a personalized feed based on the user's favorite assets and followed podcasts. Always uses the latest authoritative snapshot (is_latest). Returns snapshot_date and an array of assets, each containing: ticker, daily snapshot (sentiment, attention, consensus, momentum, summary), trading signals (w

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "get_market_history" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Fetch a historical time series of daily market-level snapshots (overall market sentiment, not a single ticker). Call this when the user asks how the overall mar…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_market_history" is 924 chars, far longer than this server's median (153). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Fetch a historical time series of daily market-level snapshots (overall market sentiment, not a single ticker). Call this when the user asks how the overall mar…

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "get_ticker_history" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Fetch a historical time series of daily snapshots for one crypto ticker. Call this when the user asks about a ticker's recent trend, wants to chart or plot α-se…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_ticker_history" is 1059 chars, far longer than this server's median (153). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Fetch a historical time series of daily snapshots for one crypto ticker. Call this when the user asks about a ticker's recent trend, wants to chart or plot α-se…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "get_my_feed" stacks urgency/override words (always, attention). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Get a personalized feed based on the user's favorite assets and followed podcasts. Always uses the latest authoritative snapshot (is_latest). Returns snapshot_d…

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_market_episodes, get_podcast_latest, get_episode_summary, get_episode_transcript, get_my_feed · Public sink: get_ticker_snapshot, get_episode_details.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_market_episodes, get_podcast_latest, get_episode_summary, get_episode_transcript, get_my_feed · Public sink: get_ticker_snapshot, get_episode_details

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
